description: Recto: Appears to be the draft of the beginning of a late letter in Judaeo-Arabic. (Halfway down the page the writer rewrites the opening line and then stops.) Subsequently it was used for writing practice of Arabic letters and "Sulyamān b. David" which is related to verso. Verso: Calligraphic title page for the book of Proverbs, with "amthāl Sulaymān" in small letters below.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
